---
title: "Case Study"
id: "mod001-se01-sec02-sp05"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set up the decision-making scenario or situation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.decision-checkpoint}
**Decision Moment**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe the situation and the immediate challenge or choice being faced._]

**What would you do next?**
1. Option A
2. Option B
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Rationale and Considerations**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for each option._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Briefly explain the consequences or provide a transition to the next topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction if appropriate for this scenario response task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.scenario-response}
**Scenario Challenge**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe a realistic or authentic scenario corresponding to the learning objectives._]

**What would you do?**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Ask the learner to respond or take action in this scenario._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Guidance and Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for different responses._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief wrap-up or next-step prompt after the scenario._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp04.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Methods Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp06.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Discussion Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
